profiles.name: Karthik Rajan
profiles.bio: Senior cinematographer with 17 years shooting Tamil and Telugu features. Known for naturalistic handheld work in realist rural dramas and bold anamorphic framing in action films.

education_training.institution: Film and Television Institute of India

endorsements.note: His handheld work gives my films their nervous heartbeat.

profiles.name: Priya Desai
profiles.bio: Fashion and editorial photographer based in Mumbai. Works with leading couture labels and lifestyle magazines. Signature style: high-key minimalist frames with bold colour blocking.

endorsements.note: She photographs clothes as if they breathe.

profiles.name: Suresh Krishnamurthy
profiles.bio: Production designer with 20 years building iconic film sets. Specializes in large-scale period sets — Mughal courts, colonial bungalows, 1970s Bombay streets. Known for obsessive historical accuracy.

endorsements.note: He doesn't build sets. He builds worlds.

profiles.name: Meera Nambiar
profiles.bio: Colorist for Malayalam and Tamil OTT films. Specializes in naturalistic colour grading — muted greens, warm ambers, and skin-tone precision. Dolby Vision certified.

endorsements.note: Her grades feel like natural memory, not correction.

profiles.name: Zaheer Mirza
profiles.bio: VFX Supervisor with 16 years delivering high-end visual effects for Bollywood and OTT films. Led VFX teams of 80+ artists on large-scale mythological and sci-fi productions.

endorsements.note: He makes the impossible look inevitable.

profiles.name: Ananya Roy
profiles.bio: Costume designer for Bengali and Hindi indie films. Works in a decolonial aesthetic — reviving handloom weaves, natural dyes, and pre-Partition silhouettes in contemporary cinema.

education_training.institution: National Institute of Fashion Technology Kolkata

profiles.name: Rajiv Menon
profiles.bio: Veteran cinematographer with 28 years and 55 feature film credits. Pioneered the use of natural diffused light in Tamil cinema. Known internationally for his collaboration with festival-circuit directors.

education_training.institution: Film and Television Institute of India

endorsements.note: He can light a set with a single candle and make it cinema.

profiles.name: Diksha Tripathi
profiles.bio: Emerging photographer and visual storyteller from Varanasi. Documents the spiritual and everyday life of the Ganga ghats in dramatic black-and-white. Sells limited edition prints internationally.

profiles.name: Arun Krishnaswamy
profiles.bio: Art director for Tamil and Malayalam features. Expert in constructing lived-in spaces — messy lower-middle-class interiors, crumbling government buildings, and market-street chaos that feel absolutely real.

education_training.institution: Government College of Fine Arts Chennai

endorsements.note: He finds the soul of working-class spaces.

profiles.name: Shreya Venkataraman
profiles.bio: Costume designer for contemporary Bollywood and fashion films. Mixes streetwear with high-fashion and focuses on character-driven wardrobe that tells backstory without dialogue.

profiles.name: Thomas Kuriakose
profiles.bio: Aerial and underwater cinematographer for nature documentaries and action features. Certified commercial drone pilot and PADI divemaster. Shot for BBC Earth and National Geographic India.

endorsements.note: Exceptional eye for marine compositions.

profiles.name: Poornima Iyer
profiles.bio: Colorist and DI supervisor for Tamil and Kannada features. Expert in cross-platform HDR delivery for theatrical, Netflix, and Amazon Prime. Runs a boutique DI suite in Chennai.

endorsements.note: The forest in Kantara looks alive because of her grades.

profiles.name: Vikram Singh
profiles.bio: VFX supervisor from Delhi with 14 years specializing in invisible VFX — digital environment extensions, set replacements, and de-ageing. Worked on international co-productions with UK and South Korea.

profiles.name: Lakshmi Subramaniam
profiles.bio: Production designer for Telugu mass entertainers and action spectaculars. Expert in designing extravagant fight arenas, stylized villain lairs, and high-octane action environments.

endorsements.note: Her action environments feel genuinely dangerous.

profiles.name: Arjun Basu
profiles.bio: Documentary and street photographer based in Kolkata. Trained under Henri Cartier-Bresson Foundation methodology. Captures fleeting urban moments with a 35mm film aesthetic.

profiles.name: Geeta Pillai
profiles.bio: Costume designer specializing in South Indian classical dance costumes and period Malayalam films. Revives dying weave traditions — Kasavu, Kaithari, and Mundum Neriyathum — for screen.

profiles.name: Imran Sheikh
profiles.bio: Art director for Bollywood commercials and music videos. Builds hyper-stylized surrealist sets — floating architecture, inverted gravity, neon dreamscapes. Works extensively with pop and electronic music artists.

profiles.name: Sanjukta Datta
profiles.bio: Young VFX artist and compositor specializing in motion graphics for OTT show title sequences and short films. Based in Pune with remote-first workflow.

profiles.name: Mahesh Babu Naidu
profiles.bio: Veteran art director and production designer for Telugu cinema with 25 years. Built sets for 80+ films including some of the highest-grossing Telugu films of all time. Deep expertise in mythological and historical sets.

education_training.institution: Govt. College of Fine Arts Hyderabad

endorsements.note: He is the architect of our epic worlds.

profiles.name: Preethi Chakravarthy
profiles.bio: Cinematographer for Tamil indie films and music videos. Shoots on 16mm and Super 8 for emotional texture. Brings an analogue warmth to digital-era storytelling.

education_training.institution: Satyajit Ray Film and Television Institute

profiles.name: Ranjith Nair
profiles.bio: Production designer for Malayalam commercial cinema and OTT thrillers. Builds production-efficient sets that maximize screen impact on limited budgets. Expert in hybrid practical-virtual set design.

profiles.name: Deepthi Shankar
profiles.bio: Wedding and portrait photographer based in Bengaluru. Shoots emotionally rich candid moments — documentary-style wedding coverage with a photojournalistic eye.

profiles.name: Balaji Venkatesan
profiles.bio: Senior colorist with 18 years and 70+ Tamil and Telugu film credits. Known for managing the entire digital intermediate pipeline from on-set LUT design through final deliverables.

endorsements.note: The gold standard of DI in South India.

profiles.name: Sonal Mehta
profiles.bio: Costume designer for Hindi OTT crime dramas and social realist films. Expert in sourcing authentic costumes for underclass characters — migrant workers, street vendors, domestic workers — without stereotyping.

profiles.name: Debashish Ghosh
profiles.bio: Cinematographer for Bengali art cinema and Indian festival-circuit films. Prefers long-take observational style and natural window light. Three films selected for international festivals.

endorsements.note: Selected — 2023 Directors Fortnight.

profiles.name: Anita Kulkarni
profiles.bio: Marathi costume designer working in contemporary social drama and historical productions. Combines traditional Paithani weave designs with modern silhouettes for strong female protagonist roles.

profiles.name: Sundar Rajan
profiles.bio: Senior DOP for Hindi feature films with 22 years and 45 credits. Specialist in rain and monsoon photography — flooding streets, reflective wet surfaces, and atmospheric diffusion. Known for innovative in-camera practical effects.

education_training.institution: Film and Television Institute of India

endorsements.note: When it needs to rain on screen, there is only one call to make.

profiles.name: Alisha Fernandes
profiles.bio: Art director for Goa-based tourism campaigns and lifestyle brands. Brings a coastal Mediterranean warmth to set design — whitewash, terracotta, oceanic light. Also directs food photography sets.

profiles.name: Yusuf Khan
profiles.bio: VFX supervisor with 13 years specializing in photoreal creature design and digital doubles for Indian mythological and fantasy films. Pioneer of Indian-language fantasy VFX pipelines.

profiles.name: Nalini Pai
profiles.bio: Production designer for Kannada commercial cinema with 15 years. Expert in designing fantasy-realist village environments that blend myth with naturalism — a visual language unique to Kannada folk narratives.

endorsements.note: She designed the visual grammar of the village for us.

profiles.name: Sunil Awasthi
profiles.bio: Wildlife and conservation photographer based in Madhya Pradesh. Has documented tigers, leopards, and vultures in Kanha and Pench for international conservation NGOs and BBC Wildlife Magazine.

profiles.name: Chandana Bose
profiles.bio: Art director for Bengali art-house cinema and experimental theatre. Creates sparse, symbolic sets where every object carries narrative weight. Strongly influenced by German Expressionism and Satyajit Ray.

endorsements.note: Her sets communicate what dialogue cannot.

profiles.name: Pradeep Chatterjee
profiles.bio: Senior cinematographer for Bollywood and Punjabi films with 21 years. Specialist in stadium-scale action spectaculars and multi-camera live event coverage. Mentors DOP aspirants at FTII short programs.

education_training.institution: Film and Television Institute of India

endorsements.note: Stadium-scale action — he's built for it.

profiles.name: Farida Hussain
profiles.bio: Portrait and fine-art photographer based in Lucknow. Documents vanishing craft traditions and artisan communities of Uttar Pradesh — chikankari embroiderers, zardozi craftsmen, block printers.

profiles.name: Renu Mathur
profiles.bio: Veteran costume designer for Hindi television and OTT with 20 years. Has costumed 15 long-running serials. Expert in managing large wardrobe departments and continuity across 300+ episode runs.

endorsements.note: Renu runs a wardrobe department like a fine clock.

profiles.name: Raghav Acharya
profiles.bio: Upcoming colorist specializing in online colour for music videos and web series. Based in Hyderabad with a home studio setup. Rapid turnaround for indie productions on DaVinci Resolve.

profiles.name: Nisha Balan
profiles.bio: Cinematographer for Malayalam and Tamil OTT thrillers. Specializes in confined, claustrophobic spaces — single-room dramas, interrogation rooms, urban apartments. Uses available light radically.

profiles.name: Aakash Sharma
profiles.bio: Emerging art director and prop designer for Himachal Pradesh-based indie films and web content. Builds hand-crafted set pieces using traditional Pahadi woodcraft and textiles.

profiles.name: Revathi Govindan
profiles.bio: VFX supervisor and motion capture specialist for Tamil and Hindi action films. Leads India's first certified motion capture studio for Indian language fantasy and superhero content.

endorsements.note: She future-proofed our entire VFX pipeline.

profiles.name: Praveen Das
profiles.bio: Doyen of Malayalam cinema production design with 28 years and 100+ film credits. Built the visual identity of an entire generation of Kerala cinema. Known for poetic, spare interiors that hold deep emotional resonance.

education_training.institution: Film and Television Institute of India

endorsements.note: He is the conscience of every frame he designs.
Walking into his sets, I always feel I've come home.
